scales.h1_hero: text-[12vw] sm:text-[8vw] leading-[0.9] tracking-tighter uppercase font-medium

rules: Headings must use Gloock or Playfair Display with extremely tight tracking (tracking-tighter).
Oversize the hero typography to simulate a printed magazine cover.
Body text should be set in Outfit for a clean, geometric contrast to the highly stylized serif.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use generous vertical rhythm. Sections should have py-24 or py-32. Elements within grids use gap-8 or gap-12.
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Use Tetris Bento grids (MODE A) for Services and Portfolio. Break symmetry. Let elements span uneven columns (e.g., col-span-8 and col-span-4).

sections.name: Header
sections.layout: Fixed to top, z-50. Glassmorphism effect: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F3F2ED]/70 border-b border-[#D5D3CB].
components: CSS Logo: A purely typographic logo 'Mo.' using the heading font (Gloock), text-3xl, tracking-tighter.
Nav Links: Clean, small uppercase links (Outfit font).
CTA Button: 'Hire Me' button in solid black, hover state vermillion.

sections.name: Hero
components: Massive Typography: 'I DESIGN', 'WEBSITES.' stacked. Font size responsive up to text-[10vw].
Subtitle: 'Freelance Web Designer & Developer. Bold digital experiences by Mohamed Abou Zeid.'
Decorative elements: Minimalist 1px lines dividing content, or a slow marquee at the bottom.

sections.name: About
sections.layout: 2-column asymmetric grid. col-span-5 for an abstract image/desk shot, col-span-7 for massive typography 'The Professional Story'.
components: Image block with a subtle 1px border.
Paragraph detailing Mo's expertise and approach.

sections.name: Services
components: Design (col-span-8 row-span-2) - Massive card with a focus on aesthetics.
Development (col-span-4 row-span-1)
SEO (col-span-4 row-span-1)
Maintenance (col-span-12 or 4) - Use sharp borders (border-[#D5D3CB]) on off-white backgrounds, no drop shadows. Flat, printed magazine feel.

sections.name: Pricing
components: Starter, Professional, Premium tiers.
Styling: Cards should have border-t-4 border-black (or accent color), flat backgrounds, list items with check icons (lucide-react).
Prices must be prominent (text-5xl heading font).

sections.name: Portfolio (Selected Work)
components: Large images (max-h-[80vh] for mobile) featuring website mockups.
Captions: Overline style (uppercase, wide tracking) below images.

sections.name: Contact & Form
sections.layout: High-contrast section. Optionally use dark background (bg-black) with off-white text to break the page flow.
components: Headline: 'Let's Build It.'
Form: Use Shadcn UI (Form, Input, Textarea, Select for Budget/Project Type).
Form Styling: Inputs should have bottom-borders only (border-b-2), no all-around borders. Feels like a printed form.

sections.name: Footer
components: Massive 'MO.' text spanning the width.
LinkedIn Link prominently displayed.
Copyright text.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for structural layouts to ensure the magazine asymmetry is preserved. Shadcn should ONLY be used for the Contact Form elements.
Ensure headings use the Gloock or Playfair Display font. Import them from Google Fonts via next/font or standard HTML link.
Implement the 'Mo.' logo entirely with HTML and CSS (e.g. Mo.). Do not use an image for the logo.
The Contact form must have fields for Name, Email, Project Type, Budget, and Message.
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, links, and form inputs as required by the testing standards.
Avoid generic shadows. Use sharp 1px borders (border-[#D5D3CB]) for division, resembling printed editorial columns.
Install lucide-react for necessary icons (checks for pricing, arrows for links).
